# G008 completion evidence — import/export HR payroll finance ERP maturity slice

Date: 2026-06-30T02:45Z

## Live equipment master import

- Source workbook: `/Users/jasonlee/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/TalkFile_장비Master List.xlsx`.
- Workbook SHA-256: `caf83ec76dbdf35e85096a46ffb33372d22adeacc37c49c102a213a10875eba2`.
- Parsed/imported rows: 444 equipment rows from `Sheet2`.
- Live DB readback: KNL `registry_equipment` total 444; branch `본사=444`; status counts `대체=4, 매각=10, 예비=32, 임대=391, 폐기=7`; legal owner counts `케이앤엘=360, 엘소=71, 청운로지스=11, 엘소창원공장(자산)=1, 코스=1`.
- Source lineage readback: 444 rows have `source_sheet=Sheet2`, source-row metadata, and source-file note metadata.
- Runtime RLS/branch proof: KNL branch-scoped ADMIN sees 444 equipment rows under `본사`.
- API proof: `GET /api/v1/equipment/list` with KNL ADMIN token returned total 444 and first rows included equipment id/no, management no, asset owner. `GET /api/v1/object-actions/catalog` returned one equipment action with `requires_passkey_step_up=true` and asset-owner/status fields.
- Browser proof: Playwright production smoke at `https://console.knllogistic.com/equipment/manage` observed live `/api/v1/equipment/list` total 444, page title `장비 관리`, create/manage action visible, screenshot stored under `.omx/context/platform-maturity-g008/equipment-master/equipment-manage-live-smoke-refresh.png`.
- Backlog added: productize flat Sheet2/column-mapped equipment import and polish remaining generic UI labels/copy.

## Live COSS Group payroll readiness staging

- Added migration `0074_create_payroll_readiness.sql` for `payroll_draft_runs`, `payroll_draft_lines`, and `annual_leave_obligations` with FORCE RLS and explicit runtime grants.
- Added `scripts/stage_coss_group_payroll_readiness.sql` deriving fail-closed payroll/leave staging from governed `data_import_runs` + `data_import_rows` for `2026/5월/%`, not from broad raw selects.
- Rollback dry-run before apply: 8 draft runs, 2,514 draft lines, 1,344 annual-leave obligations, 8 audit rows.
- Live apply: migration 74 recorded in `_sqlx_migrations` with 48-byte checksum; stage inserted 8 draft runs, 2,514 lines, 1,344 leave obligations, 8 audit events.
- Live gate state: all draft runs `BLOCKED_LEGAL_GATE`, `calculation_enabled=false`; all lines `BLOCKED_LEGAL_GATE` with `REQUIRED_NOT_SUPPLIED` NTS status; leave obligations `NEEDS_HR_REVIEW=1322`, `USAGE_PROMOTION_DRAFT_REQUIRED=22`.
- Per-org staging: cheongun-hr 68 lines/57 leave; cheongun-logis 42/23; cnl 292/193; coss 1332/651; dsl 289/141; elso 355/220; jy-tech 58/28; knl 78/31.
- RLS proof: KNL runtime context sees only 1/78/31; a non-KNL runtime context sees only its own 1/68/57.
- Guardrail: payroll calculation/issuance remains blocked until official NTS/rate artifacts, professional validation, passkey approval, wage-statement evidence, and HR review clear.

## Verification

- `node scripts/check-g008-payroll-readiness.mjs` passed.
- `npm run check:foundation-gates` passed after backlog edits.
- Fast maturity gates passed: enterprise UX parity, browser persona matrix, G004-G008, people HR, payroll release, financial, CX/reporting, operations intelligence.
- `npm --workspace web run test -- EquipmentBrowsePage.test.tsx EquipmentDetailPage.test.tsx --run` passed: 2 files, 9 tests.
- `node scripts/check-registry-equipment-rest.mjs` passed against disposable local Postgres: ownership transfer legal/accounting signoff test ok.
- Production health checks passed: `console.knllogistic.com`, `knllogistic.com`, `www.knllogistic.com` `/healthz` all `200 ok`.
- Focused app logs showed 200s for equipment list/object-actions and no matching WARN/ERROR/panic/exception in the verification window.

## Sensitive-data handling

- No spreadsheet PII/payroll raw values were committed to docs.
- Local short-lived JWT/private key temp files were removed after smoke verification.
- Sensitive SQL/API/browser artifacts remain under gitignored `.omx/context/`.
